title: Good sites for Eva Fan art or Official art
display_title: Good sites for Eva Fan art or Official art
wikitext:
[]: Good sites for Eva Fan art or Official art             Quote Post by unholyagent » Fri Mar 26, 2010 8:47 pm What are some good websites to find Eva art?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri Mar 26, 2010 8:51 pm Fan art can be seen/found in the fan art thread in the fandom area and websites like deviantart.com .

[]:             Quote Post by unholyagent » Fri Mar 26, 2010 8:55 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: Fan art can be seen/found in the fan art thread in the fandom area and websites like deviantart.com .

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Mar 27, 2010 3:16 am Also pixiv, the *booru sites and THAT BOARD.

[]:             Quote Post by LeoXiao » Sat Mar 27, 2010 2:08 pm Sankaku is good too, lots of hentai though.

[]:             Quote Post by Synapsid » Sun Mar 28, 2010 3:10 pm Mr. Tines wrote: pixiv...

[]:             Quote Post by Halicat » Mon Mar 29, 2010 4:25 am Question about pixiv, do you have to be a member to view the images? Anytime I tried viewing them it came up with a log in :S

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Mon Mar 29, 2010 4:59 am yeeeeeep, but it takes like 5 seconds to register.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Mar 31, 2010 12:50 am I was registered at Pixiv once... but after a while my registration mysteriously vaporized. I hate them now.
